name: github_set_custom_oidc_sub_claim_for_repo
description: Set the customization template for an OIDC subject claim for a repository (PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/oidc/customization/sub). Body use_default (boolean) and include_claim_keys (array, required when use_default false). Success is HTTP 201. Requires repo admin; classic tokens need repo scope. See GitHub REST Actions OIDC.
